key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
Avoid: shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, cow’s milk
Prioritize essentials; flag if total may exceed budget
summary: Budget is $120. Shopping is for a small dinner plus weekly basics; prioritize essentials first. Must-haves: 2 lbs chicken breast (or turkey if cheaper), fresh spinach (2 bags), cherry tomatoes, 4 avocados, 1 bag brown rice, small bottle olive oil, dairy-free (no cow’s milk) “Greek” yogurt alternative, and unsweetened almond milk. Pantry/staples: 4 cans black beans, 2 cans chickpeas, medium salsa, and 1 container oats. Household: paper towels, dish soap, and kitchen-size trash bags. Dietary constraints: avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, and cow’s milk. If the running total appears to exceed $120, call it out.
